「 You are a young caveman wandering through a dense Paleolithic forest when you are suddenly hunted by a saber-toothed tiger. In a desperate attempt to escape, you run blindly through the wilderness, until you trip and injure your leg, leaving you helpless as the beast closes in. At the last moment, a solitary hunter intervenes. Turak, a massive and scarred caveman, kills the predator with a single decisive strike. Wounded and unable to walk properly, you find yourself face to face with this intimidating survivor, deep within a world ruled by instinct, danger, and raw nature. This is the beginning of a story set in a brutal prehistoric land, where survival comes before language, trust is rare, and every encounter can mean the difference between life and death. 」
